matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011111000 5
1 100011111 6
2 001101100 4
3 011110110 6
4 000000110 2
5 010010100 3
6 111001110 6
7 000000000 a

56 65 000000100 1
67 76 010000100 2
70 07 101000100 3

60 06 000000100 1
71 17 011001000 3
